title: Intermittent system-tests failures
body:
e.g. https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1350/checks?check_run_id=2953073576

comments.body: A re-run of the test almost always succeeds.

@lsm5 I can’t recall any very recent instances, and I also can’t see any instance in https://cirrus-ci.com/github/containers/skopeo (which seems to go back 14 days).

https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1365/checks?check_run_id=3009248041 did fail 19 days ago, so _if_ we assume that this was actually definitely fixed about 14 days ago (possibly a bit less than 14 days, if the old ones happened to randomly pass), that gives us a fairly narrow time window of when it was, somehow, fixed.
this happened earlier today on #1365 but succeeded on a rerun, so it's still there.
For future reference: the bug is almost certainly this one, in the podman root networking stack: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11123
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Closing since the Podman flake has been fixed in the meantime.
